model.ecommerce.raw_events.name: raw_events
model.ecommerce.raw_events.raw_code: select event_id, user_id, event_type, created_at from source_system.events where created_at >= current_date - 7
model.ecommerce.raw_events.compiled_code: select event_id, user_id, event_type, created_at from analytics.events where created_at >= current_date - 7

model.ecommerce.int_orders_enriched.name: int_orders_enriched
model.ecommerce.int_orders_enriched.raw_code: select o.*, c.customer_tier from {{ ref('raw_orders') }} o left join {{ ref('raw_customers') }} c on o.customer_id = c.id or o.email = c.email
model.ecommerce.int_orders_enriched.compiled_code: select o.*, c.customer_tier from analytics.raw_orders o left join analytics.raw_customers c on o.customer_id = c.id or o.email = c.email

model.ecommerce.int_customer_orders.name: int_customer_orders
model.ecommerce.int_customer_orders.raw_code: select customer_id, count(*) as order_count, sum(amount) as total_spend from {{ ref('int_orders_enriched') }} group by 1
model.ecommerce.int_customer_orders.compiled_code: select customer_id, count(*) as order_count, sum(amount) as total_spend from analytics.int_orders_enriched group by 1

model.ecommerce.int_product_sales.name: int_product_sales
model.ecommerce.int_product_sales.raw_code: select * from {{ ref('raw_orders') }} o cross join {{ ref('raw_products') }} p where o.product_id = p.id
model.ecommerce.int_product_sales.compiled_code: select * from analytics.raw_orders o cross join analytics.raw_products p where o.product_id = p.id

model.ecommerce.int_events_daily.name: int_events_daily
model.ecommerce.int_events_daily.raw_code: select date_trunc('day', created_at) as day, event_type, count(*) from {{ ref('raw_events') }} group by 1, 2
model.ecommerce.int_events_daily.compiled_code: select date_trunc('day', created_at) as day, event_type, count(*) from analytics.raw_events group by 1, 2

model.ecommerce.fct_orders.name: fct_orders
model.ecommerce.fct_orders.raw_code: select * from {{ ref('int_orders_enriched') }} union all select * from ( select * from ( select * from {{ ref('int_product_sales') }} ) )
model.ecommerce.fct_orders.compiled_code: select * from analytics.int_orders_enriched union all select * from ( select * from ( select * from analytics.int_product_sales ) )

model.ecommerce.dim_customers.name: dim_customers
model.ecommerce.dim_customers.raw_code: select c.*, co.order_count, co.total_spend from {{ ref('raw_customers') }} c left join {{ ref('int_customer_orders') }} co on c.id = co.customer_id
model.ecommerce.dim_customers.compiled_code: select c.*, co.order_count, co.total_spend from analytics.raw_customers c left join analytics.int_customer_orders co on c.id = co.customer_id

model.ecommerce.dim_products.name: dim_products
model.ecommerce.dim_products.raw_code: select id, name, category, price from {{ ref('raw_products') }} where deleted_at is null and name like '%widget'
model.ecommerce.dim_products.compiled_code: select id, name, category, price from analytics.raw_products where deleted_at is null and name like '%widget'

model.ecommerce.rpt_sales_summary.name: rpt_sales_summary
model.ecommerce.rpt_sales_summary.raw_code: select * from {{ ref('fct_orders') }} f left join {{ ref('dim_customers') }} c on f.customer_id = c.id left join {{ ref('dim_products') }} p on f.product_id = p.id
model.ecommerce.rpt_sales_summary.compiled_code: select * from analytics.fct_orders f left join analytics.dim_customers c on f.customer_id = c.id left join analytics.dim_products p on f.product_id = p.id

model.ecommerce.rpt_daily_metrics.name: rpt_daily_metrics
model.ecommerce.rpt_daily_metrics.raw_code: select * from {{ ref('fct_events') }} union select * from {{ ref('rpt_sales_summary') }}
model.ecommerce.rpt_daily_metrics.compiled_code: select * from analytics.fct_events union select * from analytics.rpt_sales_summary
